title: Retry failed deployment build

requirements.text: Rebuild and redeploy the full application (backend Motoko actor and React frontend) resolving any compilation or deployment errors that caused the previous build to fail.

quotes: There was an development error re try

acceptanceCriteria: Backend Motoko actor compiles without errors
Frontend React app builds without errors
Application deploys successfully to the Internet Computer
All existing features (session management, player profiles, match recording, game type selector, ranked toggle) remain functional after redeployment

constraints: Do not change any existing feature logic or data models
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, hooks/useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
